extraction.one_line_summary: GREIPEL Andre won the bunch sprint after EWAN Caleb unclipped in final meters while coming around the outside
tactical_patterns: POELVOORDE Robbe attacked early KOM point while in pink jersey to take mountain classification lead, unusual aggression.
Team Katusha executed 30-second bridging effort mid-descent for ZAKARIN, revealing GC protection despite his descending weakness.
GREIPEL survived positioning issues meshed in Quickstep train, waiting until CAVAGNA checked shoulder before launching outside counter-move.

rider_signals.POELVOORDE Robbe: positive: pink jersey holder attacking for KOM points shows tactical flexibility beyond typical jersey defense
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: required full team descent rescue operation after being distanced, confirms poor technical skills liability
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: mechanical unclipping while sprinting around outside derailed winning position, indicates bike setup or pedal issues
rider_signals.GREIPEL Andre: positive: showed patience staying boxed in Quickstep train before timing final acceleration perfectly against faster sprinters
